29:     'At very high speed, colors blend and the disc appears nearly white.',
30:     'At high speed, each color becomes darker and separate.',
31:     'The disc shows only red color when speed increases.',
32:     'Color does not change with speed.',
33: ]
34: CORRECT_OPTION_INDEX = 0
35: 
36: 
37: class TutorRequest(BaseModel):
38:     classId: str = Field(..., min_length=1)
39:     experimentId: str = Field(..., min_length=1)
40:     mode: str = Field(default='ask_or_feedback')
41:     studentState: Dict[str, Any] = Field(default_factory=dict)
42: 
43: 
44: class TutorResponse(BaseModel):
45:     question: str
46:     feedback: str
47:     nextStep: str
48:     status: str
49:     options: List[str] = Field(default_factory=list)
50:     isCorrect: Optional[bool] = None
51:     botMood: str = 'neutral'
52:     answerReview: str = ''
53: 
54: 
55: def _build_newton_disc_state_summary(student_state: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
56:     speed_level = student_state.get('speedLevel', 'Low')
57:     computed = student_state.get('computed', {})
58:     white_opacity = float(computed.get('whiteOpacity', 0.0))
59: 
60:     level_order = {'Low': 0, 'Medium': 1, 'High': 2, 'Very High': 3}
61:     level_value = level_order.get(speed_level, 0)
62: 
63:     if level_value >= 3 and white_opacity >= 0.9:
64:         status = 'excellent'
65:     elif level_value >= 2 and white_opacity >= 0.6:
66:         status = 'good_try'
67:     else:
68:         status = 'needs_retry'
69: 
70:     return {
71:         'status': status,
72:         'speedLevel': speed_level,
73:         'whiteOpacity': round(white_opacity, 2),
74:     }
75: 
76: 
77: def _build_newton_question_response() -> TutorResponse:
78:     return TutorResponse(
79:         question='After increasing speed, what do you observe in Newton\'s Disc?',
80:         feedback='Run the experiment and choose one option.',
81:         nextStep='Move from Low to Very High, observe carefully, then submit your answer.',
82:         status='question',
83:         options=NEWTON_OPTIONS,
84:         isCorrect=None,
85:         botMood='neutral',
86:         answerReview='',
87:     )
88: 
89: 
90: def _evaluate_newton_option(state: Dict[str, Any]) -> TutorResponse:
91:     eval_state = _build_newton_disc_state_summary(state)
92:     selected_option = state.get('selectedOption')
93: 
94:     if not isinstance(selected_option, int):
95:         return TutorResponse(
96:             question='Choose one option first.',
97:             feedback='Select an answer option and submit.',
98:             nextStep='Observe the disc at Very High speed before answering.',
99:             status='question',
100:             options=NEWTON_OPTIONS,
101:             isCorrect=None,
102:             botMood='neutral',
103:             answerReview='Pick one option and submit.',
104:         )
105: 
106:     concept_correct = selected_option == CORRECT_OPTION_INDEX
107:     experiment_observed = eval_state['status'] in {'excellent', 'good_try'}
108: 
109:     if concept_correct and experiment_observed:
110:         return TutorResponse(
111:             question='Great job, little scientist!',
112:             feedback='Yes your experiment is correct little scientist! ...',
113:             nextStep='Yess! You got the correct answer!',
114:             status='correct',
115:             options=NEWTON_OPTIONS,
116:             isCorrect=True,
117:             botMood='happy',
118:             answerReview='Perfect observation. You matched the correct concept.',
119:         )
120: 
121:     if concept_correct and not experiment_observed:
122:         return TutorResponse(
123:             question='Good thinking!',
124:             feedback='You picked the right idea, but run the disc faster to verify it live.',
125:             nextStep='Move to Very High speed, observe white blending, then submit again.',
126:             status='retry',
127:             options=NEWTON_OPTIONS,
128:             isCorrect=False,
129:             botMood='retry',
130:             answerReview='Concept is correct, but experiment speed needs to be higher.',
131:         )
132: 
133:     return TutorResponse(
134:         question='Nice try!',
135:         feedback='You have done a try... the correct way is to increase speed and observe colors blending toward white.',
136:         nextStep='Try again: At very high speed, the disc appears nearly white.',
137:         status='incorrect',
138:         options=NEWTON_OPTIONS,
139:         isCorrect=False,
140:         botMood='oops',
141:         answerReview='Not this one. Focus on what happens at very high speed.',
142:     )
143: 
144: 
145: @app.get('/health')
146: def health() -> Dict[str, str]:

148: 
149: 
150: @app.post('/ai/tutor', response_model=TutorResponse)
151: def ai_tutor(request: TutorRequest) -> TutorResponse:
152:     if request.classId != '7' or request.experimentId != 'newton_disc':
